name: AloMedia
brief: Professional online video editor with AI-powered audio tools and real-time effects.
description:
AloMedia is a fully featured online video editor that runs in the browser. It comes with all the standard controls professionals expect: a full timeline, cut and trim tools, visual modifiers, color filters, and complete audio editing. The platform also includes AI-powered transcription and audio cleanup tools that help users produce polished content faster.

The media pipeline is optimized for speed and ease of use. Users can start editing within seconds of uploading.

name: Downforce Analytics
brief: Aerodynamic performance analysis platform for racing vehicles.
description:
Downforce Analytics is a data-driven platform that evaluates aerodynamic performance across racing vehicles. It processes publicly available datasets (a lot of data is aproximated) and applies physics-based models to calculate downforce, drag, and efficiency metrics.

The system supports comparative analysis across multiple vehicle configurations, helping users identify performance trends and relative advantages. The frontend presents complex simulation results through clear, interactive visualizations that make technical data accessible to engineers and analysts.

name: Financial App
brief: Secure financial transaction system with real-time consistency controls.
description:
A backend financial system designed for secure money transfers with strict consistency requirements. It implements idempotency mechanisms to prevent duplicate transactions, and uses pessimistic locking at the database level to eliminate race conditions during concurrent operations.

The system is built to handle real-world fintech constraints where data integrity is non-negotiable. Every transaction is traceable, balances remain accurate under load, and the architecture ensures no funds are lost or duplicated even under network instability.

name: University Management System
brief: Digital workflow platform for university internship contract lifecycle management.
description:
This platform digitizes the entire internship contract lifecycle for a university, replacing manual spreadsheets and paperwork with a structured, automated workflow. Each contract moves through clearly defined stages with role-based approvals, reducing processing time and eliminating bottlenecks.

All documents are stored in a centralized, secure repository with full version history. The system provides complete audit trails, ensuring compliance and making it easy to track every action taken on a contract from initiation to completion.
